description_long: This house features a rectangular footprint with a steeply pitched gable roof covered in dark shingles. The exterior walls are finished in a light gray stucco with subtle horizontal banding at the base and decorative window trim. The front facade includes two symmetrically placed windows with wooden frames and a simple cornice. The longer side of the house displays three windows and a large wooden garage door, suggesting a combined residential and garage function. Utility boxes and meters are visible on the side, indicating modern amenities. The overall design is modest and functional, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on practicality.
description: A modest, rectangular house with a steep gable roof, light gray stucco walls, and wooden-framed windows. Features include a large garage door and minimal decorative elements.
description_view_0: The short end of the house with two symmetrically placed windows and no visible entryway.
description_view_1: The long side of the house with three windows and a large wooden garage door, plus utility boxes.
description_view_2: The opposite short end, similar to view 0, with two windows and some visible utility boxes.
description_view_3: The long side opposite the garage, featuring three windows and utility boxes, but no door.
attribute_entryway_design: Large wooden garage door on the long side, no prominent porch or decorative entry; simple and functional.
